allow: PowerShell($log = Get-Content "terraform\\.apply.log"; $created = \($log | Select-String "Creation complete"\).Count; $creating = \($log | Select-String ": Creating\\.\\.\\."\).Count; $errors = \($log | Select-String "Error:"\).Count; "Resources created: $created / 76"; "Creation events started: $creating"; "Errors: $errors"; ""; "=== Currently in-flight \(Still creating\) ==="; $log | Select-String "Still creating" | Select-Object -Last 8)
